# suite. They pass format validation (correct length / character classes
# per SAT, RENAPO, INE, IMSS, banking specs) but do NOT belong to any
# real person or entity. This file is the CI guard: the redactor must
# strip every one of these tokens.

RFC persona: GOMJ850215AB3
RFC moral: ABC120524P76
CURP: HEGG560427MVZRRL04
INE clave: PTCSLN12345678H001
CLABE: cuenta bancaria 012180001234567890
NSS: NSS 12345678901
Phone: +52 55 1234 5678
Phone simple: 5551234567
